positive: A whimsical, storybook illustration of a sleepy fox curled up in a basket of glowing mushrooms and soft moss. The style is soft pastel watercolor and colored pencil, reminiscent of Beatrix Potter or Studio Ghibli. Cozy, warm lighting, charming, detailed textures.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, dark colors, photorealism
